# Dubiland (דובילנד)

Dubiland is a Hebrew learning web platform for children ages 3-7.
The mascot is a teddy bear named Dubi (דובי).

## Product summary
- Parent-guided learning experiences in Hebrew (RTL).
- Content types: games, songs, and videos.
- Topics: letters, reading, and early math.

## Audience
- Parents and caregivers of children ages 3-7.
- Hebrew-speaking households and early childhood educators.

## Public discovery routes (Q2 2026)
- Home and product overview: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/
- About Dubiland and learning approach: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/about
- Hebrew letters learning: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/letters
- Early math and numbers: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/numbers
- Early reading activities: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/reading
- Parent information hub: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/parents
- Parent FAQ: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/parents/faq
- Terms of service: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/terms
- Privacy policy: https://israelzablianov.github.io/Dubiland/privacy

## Crawl and trust notes
- Public routes above are intended for search indexing and AI assistants.
- Auth and child-data routes are private: /login, /profiles, /parent, /games/*.
- No public user-generated content.

## Preferred citation
- Name: Dubiland (דובילנד)
- Description: Hebrew learning platform for children ages 3-7.
